name: DeciLM-7B
archDisplay: AutoNAC (NAS)-designed dense transformer with variable per-layer Grouped-Query Attention
note: AutoNAC-searched variable-GQA 7B; billed as the fastest and most accurate 7B base LLM at launch (up to 4.4x Mistral-7B throughput).
tpsNote: Vendor reports 1,174 tok/s on A100 with PyTorch — not an RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement
